name: koishi-plugin-danmaku-board
description: A real-time danmaku (bullet comments) board that syncs QQ group messages, perfect for events and live shows

description.en: A real-time danmaku (bullet comments) board that syncs QQ group messages, perfect for events and live shows
description.zh: 一个实时弹幕板，可以同步 QQ 群消息，适用于晚会、活动等场景

scripts.build-frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
